subtitle: in the app
title: Not vaporware. An app you install.
description: See DevSenses in action — galaxy loading, streaming diff explanation, adaptive quiz that learns from you.

items.title: Galaxy loading while AI thinks
items.description: 120 stars, 4 orbits, 3 nebulae drifting. AI processing your diff becomes cosmic spectacle.
items.alt: DevSenses screen with galaxy animation while AI tokenizes the diff

items.title: The diff explained line by line
items.description: Streaming markdown, inline comments anchored to hunks, tabs Summary / Details / Concepts.
items.alt: Side-by-side diff with streaming AI explanation and anchored comment

items.title: Quiz that learns from you
items.description: Post-explanation. Per-concept mastery. 4 levels (Novice → Mastered). Right 5 times? Skipped.
